languages.text: "Моя... дочь, Ювенна, не раз высказывала опасение, что инквизитора аф Иррамона невозможно одолеть в открытом бою. Она настаивала, что мне необходимо заключить с ним соглашение. Есть ли среди вас те, кто разделяет этот сантимент?" {n}Хотя при упоминании наследницы Себериан старается сохранить спокойствие, дрожь в его голосе не укрывается от вас даже за механическим шипением вокс-решетки.{/n} "Говорите свободно, невзирая на скорбную участь самой Ювенны".
languages.translation_comment:
Играет DL_JuvennaArrestedOrDead
Не играет DL_JuvennaArrestedOrDead
Если играют DL_MerovianKilled или DL_Exalt117ArrestedOrDead, то DL_Treason_counter + 1 за каждого
выдаем Obj2_Cl_Conspiracy и Obj2_RenegadesVotes

Есть ли среди вас те, кто разделяет этот сантимент? {n}Хотя при упоминании наследницы Себериан старается сохранить спокойствие, дрожь в его голосе не укрывается от вас даже за механическим шипением вокс-решетки.{/n} Говорите свободно, невзирая на скорбную участь самой Ювенны".

languages.text: "My... daughter, Juvenna, on several occasions voiced her concern that Inquisitor af Irramon could not be defeated in open combat. She was adamant that I treat with him. Are there any among you who share this sentiment?" {n}Although Seberian tries to keep his composure at the mention of his heir, not even the hissing of his vox-grille can conceal the tremor in his voice from you.{/n} "Speak freely, and think not of Juvenna's grievous fate."
languages.original_text: "Моя... дочь, Ювенна, не раз высказывала опасение, что инквизитора аф Иррамона невозможно одолеть в открытом бою. Она настаивала, что мне необходимо заключить с ним соглашение. Есть ли среди вас те, кто разделяет этот сантимент?" {n}Хотя при упоминании наследницы Себериан старается сохранить спокойствие, дрожь в его голосе не укрывается от вас даже за механическим шипением вокс-решетки.{/n} "Говорите свободно, невзирая на скорбную участь самой Ювенны".

"My... daughter, Juvenna, on several occasions voiced her concern that Inquisitor af Irramon could not be defeated in open combat. She was adamant that I treat with him. Are there any among you who share this sentiment?" {n}Although Seberian tries to keep his composure at the mention of his heir, not even the hissing of his vox-grille can conceal the tremor in his voice from you.{/n} "Speak freely, and think not of Juvenna's grievous fate."

languages.text: “我的……女儿，尤文娜，曾不止一次表达过她的担忧。她认为正面迎战阿夫·伊拉蒙审判官几无胜算。她坚持要我与他交涉。你们之中，可有人与她想法一致？”{n}虽然塞贝里安在提到其继承人时努力保持镇定，但即使音阵格栅的嘶嘶杂音，也掩盖不住他声音里的颤抖。{/n}“尽管畅所欲言，不要去想尤文娜那令人痛心的下场。”
languages.original_text: "My... daughter, Juvenna, on several occasions voiced her concern that Inquisitor af Irramon could not be defeated in open combat. She was adamant that I treat with him. Are there any among you who share this sentiment?" {n}Although Seberian tries to keep his composure at the mention of his heir, not even the hissing of his vox-grille can conceal the tremor in his voice from you.{/n} "Speak freely, and think not of Juvenna's grievous fate."

traits.locale_text: “我的……女儿，尤文娜，曾不止一次表达过她的担忧。她认为正面迎战阿夫·伊拉蒙审判官几无胜算。她坚持要我与他交涉。你们之中，可有人与她想法一致？”{n}虽然塞贝里安在提到其继承人时努力保持镇定，但即使音阵格栅的嘶嘶杂音，也掩盖不住他声音里的颤抖。{/n}“尽管畅所欲言，不要去想尤文娜那令人痛心的下场。”

languages.text: « Ma... fille, Juvenna, a fait savoir à plusieurs reprises qu'il ne serait pas possible de vaincre l'inquisiteur af Irramon en combat ouvert. Elle insistait pour que je négocie avec lui. D'autres parmi vous sont-ils du même avis ? » {n}Même si Seberian s'efforce de ne pas laisser transparaître la moindre émotion à l'évocation de son héritière, vous décelez un tremblement dans sa voix derrière le sifflement de sa grille-vox.{/n} « Exprimez-vous librement, sans penser au triste sort de Juvenna. »
languages.original_text: "My... daughter, Juvenna, on several occasions voiced her concern that Inquisitor af Irramon could not be defeated in open combat. She was adamant that I treat with him. Are there any among you who share this sentiment?" {n}Although Seberian tries to keep his composure at the mention of his heir, not even the hissing of his vox-grille can conceal the tremor in his voice from you.{/n} "Speak freely, and think not of Juvenna's grievous fate."

traits.locale_text: « Ma... fille, Juvenna, a fait savoir à plusieurs reprises qu'il ne serait pas possible de vaincre l'inquisiteur af Irramon en combat ouvert. Elle insistait pour que je négocie avec lui. D'autres parmi vous sont-ils du même avis ? » {n}Même si Seberian s'efforce de ne pas laisser transparaître la moindre émotion à l'évocation de son héritière, vous décelez un tremblement dans sa voix derrière le sifflement de sa grille-vox.{/n} « Exprimez-vous librement, sans penser au triste sort de Juvenna. »

languages.text: «Mi... hija, Juvenna, ha expresado repetidamente su preocupación respecto al Inquisidor af Irramon; no cree que sea posible derrotarlo en combate abierto. Insistió tozudamente en que hablara con él. ¿Alguno de ustedes comparte esa opinión?». {n}Aunque Seberian intenta conservar la compostura al mencionar a su heredera, ni siquiera el siseo de la parrilla de voco puede ocultar el temblor de su voz a tus oídos.{/n} «Hablen libremente, sin pensar en el trágico destino de Juvenna».
languages.original_text: "My... daughter, Juvenna, on several occasions voiced her concern that Inquisitor af Irramon could not be defeated in open combat. She was adamant that I treat with him. Are there any among you who share this sentiment?" {n}Although Seberian tries to keep his composure at the mention of his heir, not even the hissing of his vox-grille can conceal the tremor in his voice from you.{/n} "Speak freely, and think not of Juvenna's grievous fate."

traits.locale_text: «Mi... hija, Juvenna, ha expresado repetidamente su preocupación respecto al Inquisidor af Irramon; no cree que sea posible derrotarlo en combate abierto. Insistió tozudamente en que hablara con él. ¿Alguno de ustedes comparte esa opinión?». {n}Aunque Seberian intenta conservar la compostura al mencionar a su heredera, ni siquiera el siseo de la parrilla de voco puede ocultar el temblor de su voz a tus oídos.{/n} «Hablen libremente, sin pensar en el trágico destino de Juvenna».

languages.text: "Kızım... Juvenna, birkaç kez Engizisyoncu af İrramon'un meydan muharebesinde yenilemeyeceğine dair endişelerini dile getirdi. Onunla anlaşmam gerektiğinde kararlıydı. Aranızda bu düşünceyi paylaşan var mı?" {n}Seberian, vârisinin anılması üzerine soğukkanlılığını korumaya çalışsa da voks ızgarasının tıslaması bile sesindeki titremeyi senden gizleyemiyor.{/n} "Özgürce konuşun. Juvenna'nın acı dolu kaderini düşünmeyin."
languages.original_text: "My... daughter, Juvenna, on several occasions voiced her concern that Inquisitor af Irramon could not be defeated in open combat. She was adamant that I treat with him. Are there any among you who share this sentiment?" {n}Although Seberian tries to keep his composure at the mention of his heir, not even the hissing of his vox-grille can conceal the tremor in his voice from you.{/n} "Speak freely, and think not of Juvenna's grievous fate."

traits.locale_text: "Kızım... Juvenna, birkaç kez Engizisyoncu af İrramon'un meydan muharebesinde yenilemeyeceğine dair endişelerini dile getirdi. Onunla anlaşmam gerektiğinde kararlıydı. Aranızda bu düşünceyi paylaşan var mı?" {n}Seberian, vârisinin anılması üzerine soğukkanlılığını korumaya çalışsa da voks ızgarasının tıslaması bile sesindeki titremeyi senden gizleyemiyor.{/n} "Özgürce konuşun. Juvenna'nın acı dolu kaderini düşünmeyin."

languages.text: "Meine Tochter Juvenna hat mehrmals Bedenken geäußert, wonach Inquisitor af Irramon in einem offenen Kampf nicht besiegt werden kann. Sie bestand darauf, dass ich mich mit ihm befasse. Teilt jemand diese Einschätzung?" {n}Obwohl sich Seberian bei der Erwähnung seiner Erbin bemüht, sich nichts anmerken zu lassen, kann selbst das Zischen seines Vox-Gitters das Zittern in seiner Stimme nicht verbergen.{/n} "Sprecht frei heraus und denkt nicht an Juvennas schreckliches Schicksal."
languages.original_text: "My... daughter, Juvenna, on several occasions voiced her concern that Inquisitor af Irramon could not be defeated in open combat. She was adamant that I treat with him. Are there any among you who share this sentiment?" {n}Although Seberian tries to keep his composure at the mention of his heir, not even the hissing of his vox-grille can conceal the tremor in his voice from you.{/n} "Speak freely, and think not of Juvenna's grievous fate."

Sie bestand darauf, dass ich mich mit ihm befasse. Teilt jemand diese Einschätzung?" {n}Obwohl sich Seberian bei der Erwähnung seiner Erbin bemüht, sich nichts anmerken zu lassen, kann selbst das Zischen seines Vox-Gitters das Zittern in seiner Stimme nicht verbergen.{/n} "Sprecht frei heraus und denkt nicht an Juvennas schreckliches Schicksal."

languages.text: 「私の娘、ジュベナは、インキジター・ア・イルラモンは正面から倒すことはできないと何度も訴えてきました。私は彼と交渉するべきだと強く主張しました。あなた方の中に、同じ考えを持つ者はいますか？」{n}セベリアンは、自分の後継者である娘の話を聞くにあたり、落ち着きを保とうと努めていますが、彼のヴォックス・グリルのヒスすらも、彼の声の震えを隠すことはできません。{/n}「自由に話してください。ジュベナの悲惨な運命を考えないでください。」
languages.original_text: "My... daughter, Juvenna, on several occasions voiced her concern that Inquisitor af Irramon could not be defeated in open combat. She was adamant that I treat with him. Are there any among you who share this sentiment?" {n}Although Seberian tries to keep his composure at the mention of his heir, not even the hissing of his vox-grille can conceal the tremor in his voice from you.{/n} "Speak freely, and think not of Juvenna's grievous fate."
